title: Translate This!
body:
This mod is a translator built into your game!

How to use?

You are sending a message of this type:

%ru How are you? 

Where "ru" is the id of the language you want to translate into and "How are you?" is the message you want to translate.

When you send a message, a translation will be sent to you in the chat, but your message will not be sent to other players.
